## Description

What does this PR do and why?

## Area affected

- [ ] Template files (`templates/`)
- [ ] Setup scripts (`setup-project.ps1` / `.sh`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`)
- [ ] User-level reference (`user-level-reference/`)
- [ ] MCP server guide (`mcp-servers/`)

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New template variant
- [ ] Enhancement to existing template

## Testing

How was this tested?

- [ ] Ran setup script with `--dry-run`
- [ ] Ran setup script end-to-end against a temp directory
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on Linux/macOS

## Checklist

- [ ] Cross-platform compatibility maintained (PowerShell + Bash)
- [ ] All affected template variants updated consistently
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No hardcoded personal paths
